Q1_Consent: You are invited to participate in a short survey about ice cream purchasing. Your responses are anonymous and for academic research only. You may stop at any time.
Q2_PurchaseRecent: Have you purchased ice cream in the past 6 months?
Q3_DecisionRole: When ice cream is purchased for your household, what is your role in deciding which ice cream to buy?
Q4_PurchaseFreq: How often do you buy ice cream?
Q5_UsualChannel: Where do you usually buy ice cream? - Selected Choice
Q5_UsualChannel_5_TEXT: Where do you usually buy ice cream? - Other (please specify) - Text
Q6_BrandsBought: Which brands have you purchased in the last 3 months? (Select all that apply.) - Selected Choice
Q6_BrandsBought_9_TEXT: Which brands have you purchased in the last 3 months? (Select all that apply.) - Other (please specify) - Text
Q7_BrandMostOften: Which brand do you purchase most often?
Q8_AttrImportance_1: When choosing ice cream, how important is each of the following? - Taste
Q8_AttrImportance_2: When choosing ice cream, how important is each of the following? - Price
Q8_AttrImportance_3: When choosing ice cream, how important is each of the following? - Brand reputation
Q8_AttrImportance_4: When choosing ice cream, how important is each of the following? - Low/zero sugar
Q8_AttrImportance_5: When choosing ice cream, how important is each of the following? - High protein
Q8_AttrImportance_6: When choosing ice cream, how important is each of the following? - Short/clean ingredient list
Q8_AttrImportance_7: When choosing ice cream, how important is each of the following? - Low calorie content
Q8h_QualityCheck_Trap1: To ensure data quality, please select "Not at all important" for this item.
Q9_Tradeoff: If you had to choose only one, which would be more important in ice cream?
Q11_Appeal: Thinking about the Breyers Better For You ice cream : How appealing is this product concept?
Q12_PurchaseIntent: Thinking about the Breyers Better For You ice cream : If this product were available where you shop, how likely would you be to buy it?
Q13_Replacement: Thinking about the Breyers Better For You ice cream : If you purchased this product, would it:
Q13A_WhatReplaced: Thinking about the Breyers Better For You ice cream : If it replaced your usual ice cream at least sometimes, what would it most likely replace?
Q14_InterestComparison: Thinking about the Breyers Better For You ice cream : Compared to regular ice cream, how interested are you in this product?
Q15_AttentionCheck_1: Thinking about the Breyers Better For You ice cream : To confirm you are paying attention, please select "Somewhat agree" below.
Q16_PurchaseLocation: Thinking about the Breyers Better For You ice cream : Where would you most likely purchase this type of product?
Q17a_Price399: How likely would you be to buy it at $3.99?
Q17b_Price499: How likely would you be to buy it at $4.99?
Q17c_Price599: How likely would you be to buy it at $5.99?
Q17d_Price699: How likely would you be to buy it at $6.99?
Q17e_Price799: How likely would you be to buy it at $7.99?
Q18_PriceTooExpensive: Setting aside the prices you were just asked about, at what price point would a 1-pint container of this product feel too expensive to purchase? $__________ (e.g., 7.99)
Q19_ClubStore4Pack: If this product were sold as a 4-pack at a club store (e.g., Costco or Sam's), would you consider buying it?
Q20_OnlineDelivery: How likely would you be to purchase this product through online grocery delivery?
Q21_DietFocus: Which of the following best describes you right now?
Q24_Income: What is your approximate annual household income?
